TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Turkmenistan, title = Turkmenistan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Turkmenistan} }

S.FORM: Turkmenistan Itini i 40 00 N, 60 00 E, noAsiya ko Turkmenistan. Polong no sekalay i 488,100 sq km "saka 53 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 469,930 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 18,170 sq km " Polong i 5,291,317 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 72%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 8.80%, malo no roma to a sera 19.20%. siyoto O (((Ashgabat)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 27 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Serdar Berdimuhamedow, patirengan a romi'ad i 2022 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 21 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: to~u~urkm…ônistan itini i ** ** n, ** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u to~u~urkm…ônistan. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra *.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((asńß*ab~b~vat)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakamo~u…ôt…ôp ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i s…ôr…¨~…ģar b~b~v…ôr…¨~…ģimo~u~uńßam…ô…¨~…ģo~uw, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Turkmenistan Itini i 40 00 N, 60 00 E, noAsiya ko Turkmenistan. Polong no sekalay i 488,100 sq km "saka 53 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 469,930 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 18,170 sq km " Polong i 5,291,317 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 72%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 8.80%, malo no roma to a sera 19.20%. siyoto O (((Ashgabat)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 27 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Serdar Berdimuhamedow, patirengan a romi'ad i 2022 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 21 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
